description.value: You grow flesh on a decomposed or skeletonized corpse of a Medium or smaller creature, providing it with sufficient flesh that it can be animated as a zombie rather than a skeleton. The corpse looks as it did when the creature died. The new flesh is somewhat rotted and not fit for eating. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game: Ultimate Magic.
